mentions.textRef: all the magicians of Egypt
in all the land of Egypt (describing the ugly cows)
great abundance in all the land of Egypt
abundance forgotten in the land of Egypt
set a wise man over the land of Egypt
take a fifth of the land of Egypt
food reserve for the land of Egypt during famine
Joseph set over all the land of Egypt
ruler over all the land of Egypt
no one shall lift hand or foot in all the land of Egypt
On (Heliopolis), city of Joseph's father-in-law Potiphera the priest
Joseph went out over the land of Egypt
king of Egypt (melekhe-mitserayim)
Joseph passed through all the land of Egypt
gathered food during seven years in the land of Egypt
On (Heliopolis), Asenath daughter of Potiphera priest of On
seven years of abundance in the land of Egypt ended
in all the land of Egypt there was bread
all the land of Egypt was famished
Pharaoh told all Egypt to go to Joseph
Joseph sold grain to the Egyptians
famine was severe in the land of Egypt
all the earth came to Egypt (mitserayemah) to buy grain
